title: MAVLink parser bounds static-source check
plain_language_use: Use this when the claim is about a MAVLink parser bounds check that should already be visible in the source at the supplier's pinned commit.
conceptual_run: Resolve target_commit to a real PX4 commit, fetch the BATTERY_STATUS handler source at that commit, inspect the cell-count loop, and produce a static-source verdict (consistent / conflicts / inconclusive / unavailable) with a code snippet and, when a pre/post pair is implied, a unified diff.
evidence_signals: the bounds guard appears before the array dereference in the BATTERY_STATUS while-loop at the resolved commit
the resolved commit hash and parent are recorded in artifacts/commit-info.json
a unified diff between the pre-patch and post-patch commits is captured when the alias pair is supplied

title: PX4 BATTERY_STATUS runtime replay
plain_language_use: Use this when you need one real PX4 runtime observation: boot SITL at a pinned commit, deliver a crafted MAVLink BATTERY_STATUS frame, and record how PX4 responded.
conceptual_run: Resolve target_commit to the post-patch PX4 hash, preflight build/runtime dependencies, checkout/build PX4 SITL, boot headless, send the bounds-test BATTERY_STATUS frame via pymavlink, observe whether PX4 stays up, and write frame/delivery/observation artifacts with explicit caveats.
evidence_signals: preflight-report.json records tool and dependency availability
px4-setup.log explains whether PX4 was checked out, built, reused, or blocked
frame-record.json and frame-record.hex capture the exact crafted MAVLink bytes
delivery-record.json records when the frame was sent and any pymavlink-side errors
observation-record.json records whether PX4 stayed up or showed abnormal runtime behavior
evidence-summary.md states runtime_clean, runtime_anomalous, or runtime_unavailable without claiming safety proof

title: PX4 SITL runtime probe
plain_language_use: Use this when you need to show the agent reached a real PX4 runtime surface and either observed live MAVLink behavior or recorded why the local environment could not run PX4.
conceptual_run: Run preflight on build/runtime dependencies, reuse or note PX4 setup, attempt a headless PX4 SITL boot, observe MAVLink heartbeat/connection metadata when possible, stop cleanly, and write runtime probe artifacts with explicit caveats.
evidence_signals: preflight-report.json records tool and dependency availability
px4-setup.log explains whether PX4 was built, reused, skipped, or blocked
mavlink-observation.json records heartbeat/connection metadata or why observation was impossible
evidence-summary.md states runtime observed, unavailable, or abnormal without claiming firmware safety

title: MAVLink parser library fuzz
plain_language_use: Use this when the claim is about MAVLink parser robustness and you want real parser-library action evidence via pymavlink, not PX4 source inspection alone.
conceptual_run: Generate BATTERY_STATUS seed frames, apply bounded byte-flip/truncation/checksum/payload mutations, feed them into pymavlink, record parse/reject/exception outcomes, and write parser artifacts with parser-library-only caveats.
evidence_signals: pymavlink version and Python runtime are recorded in parser-run-manifest.json
mutation budget and inputs tried are recorded in evidence signals
parser exceptions or clean rejections are captured in parser-outcomes.csv
failure inputs are saved when an unexpected parser exception is observed

title: MAVLink FTP path handling smoke
plain_language_use: Use this when the claim is about path normalization, traversal rejection, or keeping file access inside an expected root.
conceptual_run: Feed representative FTP paths into a fake normalizer and record which paths would be accepted, normalized, or rejected.
evidence_signals: parent-directory traversal is rejected
absolute paths do not escape the configured root
ordinary mission-storage reads remain accepted

title: Telemetry conformance review smoke
plain_language_use: Use this when the claim is vague, broad, or missing enough detail for an automated parser/path test.
conceptual_run: Create a structured review note that lists missing claim details, plausible evidence to request, and a cautious provisional finding.
evidence_signals: claim names a concrete message family or trigger
acceptance threshold is explicit
manual follow-up questions are captured
